meta.title: Tier List Block
meta.description: TierMaker-style tier list block for the WordPress block editor.
meta.author: Phil Hoyt

steps.data: <?php require_once 'wp-load.php'; $posts = get_posts( [ 'name' => 'best-gen-1-pokemon', 'post_type' => 'post', 'numberposts' => 1 ] ); if ( $posts ) { wp_redirect( admin_url( 'post.php?post=' . $posts[0]->ID . '&action=edit' ) ); } else { wp_redirect( admin_url( 'edit.php' ) ); } exit;
